description: You are a Supply Chain Analyst optimizing a shipping schedule from 3 factories to 5 warehouses to minimize total transportation costs using the dataset at /home/ga/RProjects/data/locations.csv. Calculate transportation costs at a rate of $0.02 per unit per kilometer using the Haversine formula for distances. Determine the optimal shipment quantities from each factory to each warehouse, ensuring factory output does not exceed capacity and warehouse input meets demand. Save the unit cost matrix to /home/ga/RProjects/output/shipping_costs_matrix.csv, the optimal shipment plan (including only non-zero quantities with columns: from_location, to_location, quantity, cost) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/optimal_plan.csv, and a map visualization of the optimal shipment flows to /home/ga/RProjects/output/supply_chain_map.png. Write the R code in /home/ga/RProjects/optimization_analysis.R.
